query:
-- Check all unmatched SasBoss services grouped by plan type
SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services
WHERE status = 'unmatched' AND provider = 'SasBoss'
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- Check billing items with no contact name match - look for account 94152 pattern
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactName, bi.matchStatus, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.matchStatus IN ('unmatched', 'pending')
  AND (bi.lineAmount > 80 AND bi.lineAmount < 100)
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Check if there's a Xero contact named Mooloolaba Osteopathy with different spelling
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status
FROM customers
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%osteo%' OR LOWER(xeroContactName) LIKE '%osteo%';
